title: Voluntary transfer of corporate assets
doc_html:
PART XII.  TRANSFERS OF CORPORATE ASSETS

§121.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1970, No. 50, §§10, 11, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2014.
doc_text:
PART XII.  TRANSFERS OF CORPORATE ASSETS
§121.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1970, No. 50, §§10, 11, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2014.
